name: The Transfiguration
oracleText:
At the beginning of combat on your turn, put a +1/+1 counter on target creature you control.
That creature gains flying and vigilance until end of turn.
flavorText: "This is my beloved Son: hear him." — Luke 9:35
notes: Created from a checked Messianic Fulfillment card list item; first-pass mana, colors, and mechanics were added, but final tuning remains pending. Source boundary is anchored to Luke with Matthew, Mark, and John as support material per the Biblical-series timeline guide. Classics theme art uses James Tissot's "The Transfiguration" via Wikimedia Commons.

classics.license: Public domain; Brooklyn Museum Commons upload marked with no known restrictions.
classics.sourceNotes: Strong, luminous classical treatment of the mountain epiphany.
